SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:37am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Brian Pedersen appears in pro per. Respondent, Peter Kozlowski appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHA (1) 2 page statement of facts
EXHR (A) Copies of cancelled checks
EXHR (B) Copy of Lease Agreement

10:01am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
